sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْبَرْمَجَةُ عُنْصُرًا أَسَاسِيًّا يَنْبَغِي لِكُلِّ طَالِبٍ إِتْقَانُ مَبَادِئِهَا لِمُوَاكَبَةِ الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje je postalo osnovni element čije bi principe svaki učenik trebao savladati kako bi išao u korak s vremenom.
sentences.translationEn: Programming has become an essential element whose principles every student should master to keep up with the times.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ الْعَدِيدُ مِنَ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ فِي دَمْجِ التَّكْوِيدِ ضِمْنَ الْمَنَاهِجِ الدِّرَاسِيَّةِ لِإِعْدَادِ جِيلٍ مِنَ الْمُبْتَكِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Mnoge arapske zemlje počele su integrisati kodiranje u školske planove i programe kako bi pripremile generaciju inovatora.
sentences.translationEn: Many Arab countries have begun integrating coding into school curricula to prepare a generation of innovators.

sentences.arabic: كِتَابَةُ الشِّفْرَةِ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ أَوَامِرَ تَقْنِيَّةٍ، بَلْ هِيَ وَسِيلَةٌ لِتَنْمِيَةِ التَّفْكِيرِ الْمَنْطِقِيِّ وَحَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Pisanje koda nisu samo tehničke naredbe, već način za razvoj logičkog razmišljanja i rješavanja problema.
sentences.translationEn: Writing code is not just technical commands, but a means to develop logical thinking and problem-solving.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ الْمَنَصَّاتُ مَفْتُوحَةُ الْمَصْدَرِ فُرْصَةً ذَهَبِيَّةً لِلشَّبَابِ لِلتَّعَلُّمِ وَالْمُسَاهَمَةِ فِي مَشَارِيعَ عَالَمِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Platforme otvorenog koda pružaju zlatnu priliku mladima da uče i doprinose globalnim projektima.
sentences.translationEn: Open-source platforms provide a golden opportunity for youth to learn and contribute to global projects.

sentences.arabic: لَا شَكَّ أَنَّ هَذَا التَّحَوُّلَ الرَّقْمِيَّ سَيُؤَدِّي إِلَى نَقْلَةٍ نَوْعِيَّةٍ فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ الْمَحَلِّيِّ.
sentences.translation: Nema sumnje da će ova digitalna transformacija dovesti do kvalitativnog skoka na lokalnom tržištu rada.
sentences.translationEn: There is no doubt that this digital transformation will lead to a qualitative leap in the local job market.
